channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Southern Africa to strengthen regional power networks and expand renewable energy
item.description: Leaders from across Southern Africa gathered in Lusaka for a high-level Southern African Power Pool (SAPP) meeting, highlighting the urgent need to modernise and expand the region’s electricity infras...

item.title: Raptors defeat Suns 122-115 with key contributions from Barnes and Barrett
item.description: The Toronto Raptors claimed a solid 122-115 victory against the Phoenix Suns in a high-scoring match that highlighted the growing synergy between young stars Scottie Barnes and OG Anunoby Barrett. Bot...

item.title: Waiguru Urges Gachagua to Engage Ruto Directly Amid Political Tensions in Mt Kenya
item.description: Kirinyaga Governor Anne Waiguru has publicly criticised former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua for allegedly using intermediaries in his dealings with President William Ruto, urging him to engage di...

item.title: Lawmakers may request financial records to clarify VP Sara Duterte's wealth increase
item.description: Bicol Saro party-list Congressman Terry Ridon has raised concerns about an alleged P50-million discrepancy between Vice President Sara Duterte's declared net worth and her estimated cumulative governm...

item.title: Daniel Atkinson assists Valentine Holmes with a precise pass
item.description: During the recent NRL match, Dragons recruit Daniel Atkinson demonstrated his playmaking skills by delivering an exceptional pass that allowed Valentine Holmes to score a try. This moment highlighted ...

item.title: Five New Fictional Works and a Short Story Collection Recommended for Readers
item.description: Scroll.in presents a curated selection of new fiction releases that cater to a variety of readers. Among the highlights is 'White River Crossing' by Ian McGuire, a historical adventure set in 1766, wh...

item.title: President Ruto Commissions 120 Homes at Emgwen Boma Yangu Estate, Nandi
item.description: On Thursday, President William Ruto officially opened the Emgwen Boma Yangu Estate in Nandi County, handing over keys to 120 new homeowners under Kenya's Affordable Housing Programme. The estate offer...

item.title: Conservative Analysis Estimates Significant Proportion of Future UK Homes Will House Migrants
item.description: A Conservative Party analysis, drawing on the Office for Budget Responsibility's latest Economic and Fiscal Outlook, suggests that nearly 40 per cent of new homes built in the UK between 2026 and 2030...

item.title: Prominent Ladakh activist Sonam Wangchuk released after preventive detention
item.description: India has released prominent Ladakh activist Sonam Wangchuk after he spent six months in preventive detention under the National Security Act. Wangchuk, 59, an environmentalist and advocate for Ladakh...

item.title: Family criticises lack of changes at Addenbrooke's neurosciences unit nearly a decade after avoidable death
item.description: The family of John Brackenbury, who died in 2016 at Addenbrooke's Hospital in Cambridge following a brain haemorrhage, has expressed fury and disappointment after learning that recommended improvement...

item.title: Former Labour MP Phil Woolas dies aged 66 after long illness
item.description: Phil Woolas, a former Labour MP and government minister, has died at the age of 66 following a prolonged battle with brain cancer. Woolas, who represented Oldham East and Saddleworth from 1997 until 2...

item.title: Tamil Nadu offers electricity subsidy to restaurants adopting induction stoves amid LPG shortage
item.description: The Tamil Nadu government on Saturday announced a subsidy of ₹2 per unit of electricity for restaurants, hotels, and tea shops that switch from commercial LPG cylinders to electric induction stoves. T...

item.title: Rising Oil Prices May Lead to Higher Airline Ticket Costs
item.description: The recent conflict in Iran, beginning February 28, has disrupted global oil supplies and driven up prices, prompting concerns over rising airline ticket costs. Airlines generally purchase fuel on an ...

item.title: Team USA Manager Mark DeRosa Addresses Criticism Following World Baseball Classic Loss
item.description: Team USA manager Mark DeRosa defended his management decisions after criticism following the 2026 World Baseball Classic. The scrutiny intensified after Team USA suffered a surprising 8–6 defeat again...

item.title: Federal ban on second-generation rodenticides protects native Australian animals
item.description: Australian authorities have recently announced a significant ban on second-generation anticoagulant rodenticides (SGARs), a class of rat and mouse poisons that have been proven to pose serious threats...

item.title: US Military Assets to Remain in Philippine Bases Amid Middle East Conflicts
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – The United States has no plans to withdraw its military assets from the Philippines, according to Rear Admiral Roy Vincent Trinidad, Philippine Navy spokesperson for the West Phi...

item.title: Captain Sammir Reconciles with Wife Gilo, Affirms Their Marriage Is Still Strong
item.description: TikTok star Captain Sammir has publicly apologised to his wife, Gilo Ntinyari, after a heated exchange of personal allegations online. The drama began after Sammir expressed regret over how rushed the...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Introduces Salary Cuts and Government Spending Reductions Amid Fuel Crisis
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has announced a set of austerity measures to help Pakistan cope with the financial impact of the ongoing Middle East conflict. These measures include salary re...

item.title: Heavy rains cause flooding and disrupt life in Dar es Salaam
item.description: Dear nephew Milambo, greetings from Dar es Salaam. Life here is very different from our village Ukumbisiganga in Tabora. The city is noisy, busy and full of traffic jams, which makes moving around a b...

item.title: SADC Urged to Boost Industrial Growth Through Mineral Value Addition and Regional Integration
item.description: Elias Magosi, Executive Secretary of the Southern African Development Community (SADC), has called on the region to move beyond exporting raw minerals and accelerate value addition to drive industrial...
